title: Rich Fettuccine Pasta
description: A creamy fettuccine pasta dish inspired by Malaysian flavors.
instructions: Cook the fettuccine pasta according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, toast the peanuts over medium heat for 2 minutes.
In a blender or food processor, combine the coconut cream, toasted peanuts, soy sauce, fish sauce, lime juice, garlic, and sugar. Blend until smooth.
In a large saucepan, combine the blended coconut mixture and grated coconut. Whisk over medium heat until the sauce thickens.
Add the cooked fettuccine pasta to the saucepan and toss until well coated.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
